Package space.sunqian.fs.data.properties

Interface PropertiesData

All Superinterfaces:
ByteData, CharData
public interface PropertiesData extends ByteData, CharData
The interface represents properties data.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    default @Nonnull DataMap
    asDataMap()
    Returns a DataMap view of the properties, any changes to the map will be reflected in the properties, and vice versa.
    default @Nonnull Map<@Nonnull String,@Nonnull Object>
    asMap()
    Returns a map view of the properties, any changes to the map will be reflected in the properties, and vice versa.
    @Nonnull Properties
    asProperties()
    Returns a properties view of the properties, any changes to the properties will be reflected in the map, and vice versa.
    default boolean
    getBoolean(@Nonnull String name)
    Returns true if the property value is enabled checked by StringKit.isEnabled(CharSequence), otherwise false.
    default double
    getDouble(@Nonnull String name)
    Gets the double value of the property, or 0.0 if not found.
    default double
    getDouble(@Nonnull String name, double defaultValue)
    Gets the double value of the property, or defaultValue if not found.
    default float
    getFloat(@Nonnull String name)
    Gets the float value of the property, or 0.0f if not found.
    default float
    getFloat(@Nonnull String name, float defaultValue)
    Gets the float value of the property, or defaultValue if not found.
    default int
    getInt(@Nonnull String name)
    Gets the int value of the property, or 0 if not found.
    default int
    getInt(@Nonnull String name, int defaultValue)
    Gets the int value of the property, or defaultValue if not found.
    default long
    getLong(@Nonnull String name)
    Gets the long value of the property, or 0 if not found.
    default long
    getLong(@Nonnull String name, long defaultValue)
    Gets the long value of the property, or defaultValue if not found.
    default @Nullable String
    getString(@Nonnull String name)
    Gets the string value of the property, or null if not found.
    default String
    getString(@Nonnull String name, String defaultValue)
    Gets the string value of the property, or defaultValue if not found.
    static @Nonnull PropertiesData
    load(@Nonnull InputStream in)
    Loads properties from the given input stream, using CharsKit.defaultCharset().
    static @Nonnull PropertiesData
    load(@Nonnull Reader reader)
    Loads properties from the given reader, using CharsKit.defaultCharset().
    static @Nonnull PropertiesData
    load(@Nonnull ReadableByteChannel channel)
    Loads properties from the given readable byte channel, using CharsKit.defaultCharset().
    default void
    remove(@Nonnull String name)
    Removes the property.
    default void
    set(@Nonnull String name, @Nonnull Object value)
    Sets the value of the property.
    @Nonnull String
    toString()
    Returns a string representation of the current properties.
    default void
    writeTo(@Nonnull OutputStream out)
    Writes the properties to the given output stream with the CharsKit.defaultCharset().
    default void
    writeTo(@Nonnull Appendable appender)
    Writes the current data to the given writer.
    default void
    writeTo(@Nonnull WritableByteChannel channel)
    Writes the properties to the given writable byte channel with the CharsKit.defaultCharset().

  • Method Details

    • load

      @Nonnull static @Nonnull PropertiesData load(@Nonnull @Nonnull InputStream in) throws DataParsingException
      Loads properties from the given input stream, using CharsKit.defaultCharset().

      This method uses PropertiesParser.defaultParser() to parse the properties.

      Parameters:
      in - the input stream to read from
      Returns:
      a new PropertiesData wraps the loaded properties
      Throws:
      DataParsingException - if an I/O error occurs while loading the properties

    • load

      @Nonnull static @Nonnull PropertiesData load(@Nonnull @Nonnull ReadableByteChannel channel) throws DataParsingException
      Loads properties from the given readable byte channel, using CharsKit.defaultCharset().

      This method uses PropertiesParser.defaultParser() to parse the properties.

      Parameters:
      channel - the readable byte channel to read from
      Returns:
      a new PropertiesData wraps the loaded properties
      Throws:
      DataParsingException - if an I/O error occurs while loading the properties

    • load

      @Nonnull static @Nonnull PropertiesData load(@Nonnull @Nonnull Reader reader) throws DataParsingException
      Loads properties from the given reader, using CharsKit.defaultCharset().

      This method uses PropertiesParser.defaultParser() to parse the properties.

      Parameters:
      reader - the reader to read from
      Returns:
      a new PropertiesData wraps the loaded properties
      Throws:
      DataParsingException - if an I/O error occurs while loading the properties

      @Nullable default @Nullable String getString(@Nonnull @Nonnull String name)
      Gets the string value of the property, or null if not found.

      Returns:
      the string value of the property, or null if not found

      defaultValue - the default value
      Returns:
      the string value of the property, or defaultValue if not found

    • asProperties

      @Nonnull @Nonnull Properties asProperties()
      Returns a properties view of the properties, any changes to the properties will be reflected in the map, and vice versa.
      Returns:
      a properties view of the properties
